quoteLast: Sciatic nerve stimulated.  ABRUPT RISE AND FALL IN               BLOOD-PRESSURE.  3.32 p.m.  Sciatic nerve stimulated.  RISE AND FALL IN               BLOOD-PRESSURE.  4.16 p.m.  Sciatic nerve stimulated.  BLOOD-PRESSURE ROSE TO 120,               FALLING TO 105.  4.34 p.m.  Sciatic nerve stimulated.  ABRUPT RISE AND FALL OF               BLOOD-PRESSURE.  4.53 p.m.  Sciatic nerve stimulated.  THE USUAL RISE AND FALL               FOLLOWED."
title: An ethical problem; or, Sidelights upon scientific experimentation on man and animals
author: Leffingwell, Albert, 1845-1916
